hero.name: Lyhong Peou
hero.title: Full-Stack Developer
hero.tagline: Designing, building, and shipping digital products — fast.

experience.blurb: A small team of engineers that designs, builds, and ships digital products — fast, and without the agency overhead. See what we've shipped under work/ below.

highlights: Built the front and back end of Parchment using the Quill custom JS framework.
Engineered a filesystem-tree UI for navigating nested Spaces and dragging files across folders.

studio.title: Skylab Fitness
studio.description: Skylab Fitness was running their bookings entirely manual. We built them a full-stack web app where clients can book classes and track their credit balance, while staff manage scheduling and payments from a clean admin interface. The result: less admin overhead, fewer errors, and a smoother experience for everyone.

studio.title: Ruma
studio.description: Ruma is our own in-house product built for serious property investors. Users can model rental yields and capital growth, create and compare multiple scenarios side by side, and get fees auto-calculated. It replaces guesswork with clarity, giving investors the data they need to act with confidence. Launching soon in Malaysia.

studio.title: Reflect
studio.description: Built end-to-end during a competitive hackathon, Reflect teaches users to identify and avoid scams. It features an AI chatbot for real-time scam advice, a minigame that generates unique phishing scenarios for users to classify, and a community forum for sharing experiences. All powered by the Gemini API inside Google AI Studio.

studio.title: Orbit
studio.description: Orbit is our in-house booking platform for any business that lives and dies by its calendar. Clients book and pay online, businesses manage customers and run promotions, and everything stays in one place — no more spreadsheets. Currently in active development.

personal.title: Portfolio
personal.description:
Built a responsive personal portfolio website with a terminal-inspired design and smooth user experience.

• Dark/light mode toggle with custom CSS variables
• Terminal-style interface with typing animations
• Modal-based project showcase with mobile optimization
• Responsive design from mobile-first to desktop

personal.title: Slow Typer
personal.description:
Built a minimalist typing speed test with real-time WPM tracking and visual feedback.

• Performance analytics dashboard
• Responsive design for distraction-free practice
• Real-time accuracy measurement

personal.title: Clue-Less
personal.description:
Implemented a multiplayer web version of the classic Clue board game with real-time gameplay.

• Lobby system with character selection
• Turn-based mechanics and game state sync
• Real-time multiplayer functionality

Team project for Foundations of Software at Johns Hopkins University.
Collaborated with Amanda Lowery (PM), Linda Nguyen (Lead Dev), and Deon Odom (QA).
